name: orca-design-orchestrator-mcp
description: MCP bridge for Orca professional page design workflows, Obsidian memory, NotebookLM packs, n8n workflow registration, and QA evidence.

tools.name: create_design_brief
tools.description: Normalize a raw page-design request into a structured professional design brief.

tools.name: register_orca_blueprint
tools.description: Create or update an Orca workflow blueprint with nodes, edges, settings and n8n metadata.

tools.name: write_obsidian_memory
tools.description: Write project decisions, prompts, plans and QA evidence into an Obsidian-compatible Markdown note.

tools.name: generate_notebooklm_pack
tools.description: Build a NotebookLM-ready source folder with research, UX, SEO, prompts and QA documents.

tools.name: generate_animation_brief
tools.description: Generate a motion brief using Three.js, GSAP, Lenis, GLSL, reduced motion and fallback guidance.

tools.name: run_quality_gate
tools.description: Run project quality checks and return pass/fail evidence for UI, assets, SEO, accessibility and Selenium coverage.

security.secrets_policy: No API keys or user tokens are stored in workflow JSON, blueprint settings, or Obsidian notes.
